item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:fight","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering wrongly requires actual bodily harm and does not encode each party's intention to hurt; replace the asserted harmful outcomes with reciprocal WANT clauses targeting bodily harm."}
